assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains 'LoadFromMemory' with RouteConfig and ClusterConfig
assertions.rationale: Shows proxyBuilder.LoadFromMemory with RouteConfig and ClusterConfig including route match and cluster destinations

assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains '.WithAccessToken(TokenType.User)' on the RouteConfig (YARP uses TokenType, not RequiredTokenType)
assertions.rationale: Shows .WithAccessToken(TokenType.User) on the RouteConfig with a comment noting 'YARP uses TokenType, NOT RequiredTokenType'
Shows .WithAntiforgeryCheck() chained on the RouteConfig after WithAccessToken

assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains 'MapReverseProxy' with a pipeline that calls 'UseAntiforgeryCheck()'
